rulings.Case Title: BROOK VS YIP
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION ON WRONGFUL EVICTION IS DENIED -- TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RE EVICTION AND TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT WHETHER PROPERTY RENTED TO SON DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT ATTORNEY HOWEVER MUST BE PREPARED TO EXPLAIN WHY SUPPLEMENTAL OPPOSITION WAS NOT FILED AT TIME OF ORIGINAL OPPOSITION; OTHERWISE COURT WILL NOT CONSIDER SUPPLEMENTAL OPPOSITION. (302/AJR/CW-EX)
